version](httpsbadge.fury.iopyannofabcli.svg)](httpsbadge.fury.iopyannofabcli)[[Python Versions](httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionsannofabcli.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectannofabcli)[[Documentation Status](httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectsannofab-clibadgeversionlatest)](httpsannofab-cli.readthedocs.iojalatestbadgelatest) Annofab httpsannofab.com Documentation httpsannofab-cli.readthedocs.iojalatest Annofab 2022-11-01 JMESPath --queryjq --wait_options Requirements Python 3.8+ Install pip install annofabclihttpspypi.orgprojectannofabcli Windows[GitHub](httpsgithub.comkurusugawa-computerannofab-clireleases)annofabcli-vX.X.X-windows.zipzipannofabcli.exe Docker git clone httpsgithub.comkurusugawa-computerannofab-cli.git cd annofab-cli chmod u+x docker-build.sh .docker-build.sh docker run -it annofab-cli --help Annofab docker run -it annofab-cli project diff prj1 prj2Enter Annofab User ID XXXXXXEnter Annofab Password Annofab docker run -it -e ANNOFAB_USER_IDXXXX -e ANNOFAB_PASSWORDYYYYY annofab-cli project diff prj1 prj2 Annofabhttpsannofab-cli.readthedocs.iojalatestuser_guideconfigurations.html httpsannofab-cli.readthedocs.iojalatestuser_guideindex.html httpsannofab-cli.readthedocs.iojalatestcommand_referenceindex.html caroccluded caroccludedON1 annofabcli task_idacceptance_complete_task_id.txt annofabcli task list --project_id prj1 --task_query {status complete,phaseacceptance} --format task_id_list --output acceptance_complete_task_id.txt caroccludedON annofabcli annotation list_count --project_id prj1 --task_id filetask.txt --output annotation_count.csv --annotation_query {label_name_en car, attributes[{additional_data_definition_name_en occluded, flag true}]} annotation_count.csv1task_idtask_id.txt task_id.txtcaroccluded annotation phase annofabcli task reject --project_id prj1 --task_id filetasks.txt --cancel_acceptance --comment caroccluded WindowsannofabcliWindowsPowerShellannofabcliJSON annofabcli task list --project_id prj1 --task_query {status complete}
